serviceDescription: AWS Elemental MediaLive Anywhere is a feature of MediaLive that lets you run live video encoding on premises while using the cloud for management.

cards.title: Anywhere Channel Configuration 1
cards.helpText: With the MediaLive Anywhere service, you only pay for channels running on instances managed by the service. No long-term commitments or upfront payments are needed. Hourly rates are charged based on the codec and the highest output resolution for each running channel, regardless of the number of inputs or outputs. There are no additional charges for AWS Elemental MediaLive add-on features such as advanced audio, audio normalization, and motion graphics. MediaLive Anywhere pricing is the same regardless of AWS Region.

components.content:
MediaLive Anywhere requires the AWS Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent) to authenticate and register your on-premises instances. Additional SSM Agent charges may apply if you have over 1000 instances per account per region.
You will also be charged for data transfer based on standard AWS data transfer fees for communication between the ECS Anywhere control plane and ECS agent that occurs through VPN or AWS Direct Connect.

components.label: Active hours
components.description: Number of hours per month an output is in a running state.

Hourly rates are based on the highest-priced output across a channel's output group(s), considering both codec and resolution. Channel types are arranged in order of cost, from least expensive to most premium.
components.label: Channel Type (Codec + Resolution)
